title: trasus riparius
intro: Trasus riparius, also known as the water dock or river dock, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Polygonaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Trasus riparius include its ability to reduce swelling, ease pain, and promote healing, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Trasus riparius typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and roots, which can be used both internally and externally to harness its medicinal properties.
